svg.title: Lohasmeal architecture on Naver Cloud
svg.desc: Jenkins builds the application and publishes its image to Docker Hub before deployment to a Kubernetes cluster on Naver Cloud. User and developer traffic enters Nuxt and Spring services, while Redis, MySQL, Object Storage, Sentry, and Elastic services support the commerce platform.
svg.text: Naver Cloud · Kubernetes · in-cluster data services · centralized observability

g.text: Kubernetes runs application and data workloads together; Sentinel and replication support availability.
